%_FLOWLOGIC																																
PROCESS BEFORE OUTPUT.																																
																																
  MODULE status_0100.																																
																																
*&SPWIZARD: PBO FLOW LOGIC FOR TABLECONTROL 'TC_ITEM'																																
  MODULE tc_item_change_tc_attr.																																
*&SPWIZARD: MODULE TC_ITEM_CHANGE_COL_ATTR.																																
  LOOP AT   gt_item																																
       INTO gs_item																																
       WITH CONTROL tc_item																																
       CURSOR tc_item-current_line.																																
    MODULE tc_item_get_lines.																																
*&SPWIZARD:   MODULE TC_ITEM_CHANGE_FIELD_ATTR																																
  ENDLOOP.																																
																																
PROCESS AFTER INPUT.																																
																																
  MODULE get_cursor.																																
																																
  CHAIN.																																
    FIELD gv_zlldnum MODULE get_data ON REQUEST.																																
  ENDCHAIN.																																
																																
*																																
  CHAIN.																																
    FIELD gv_aufnr MODULE get_aufnr ON REQUEST.																																
  ENDCHAIN.																																
																																
*&SPWIZARD: PAI FLOW LOGIC FOR TABLECONTROL 'TC_ITEM'																																
  LOOP AT gt_item.																																
    CHAIN.																																
      FIELD gs_item-zllditem.																																
      FIELD gs_item-aufnr.																																
      FIELD gs_item-matnr.																																
      FIELD gs_item-maktx.																																
      FIELD gs_item-bismt.																																
      FIELD gs_item-werks.																																
      FIELD gs_item-bdmng.																																
      FIELD gs_item-zenmng1.																																
      FIELD gs_item-zenmng2.																																
      FIELD gs_item-zpsdwpssl1.																																
      FIELD gs_item-zpsdwpssl2.																																
      FIELD gs_item-zbcllsl MODULE GET_zclflag ON REQUEST.																																
      FIELD gs_item-meins.																																
      FIELD gs_item-zclflag.																																
      FIELD gs_item-rsnum.																																
      FIELD gs_item-rspos.																																
      FIELD gs_item-zxqdate.																																
      FIELD gs_item-zxqtime.																																
      FIELD gs_item-zcjz.																																
      FIELD gs_item-zcjdate.																																
      FIELD gs_item-zcjtime.																																
      MODULE tc_item_modify ON CHAIN-REQUEST.																																
    ENDCHAIN.																																
    FIELD gs_item-sel																																
      MODULE tc_item_mark ON REQUEST.																																
  ENDLOOP.																																
  MODULE tc_item_user_command.																																
*&SPWIZARD: MODULE TC_ITEM_CHANGE_TC_ATTR.																																
*&SPWIZARD: MODULE TC_ITEM_CHANGE_COL_ATTR.																																
																																
  MODULE user_command_0100.
